channel.title: Comics on Everything is Gray
channel.description: Recent content in Comics on Everything is Gray

item.title: Guest Appearance on 5by5's Systematic
item.description: I recently had the pleasure of joining Brett Terpstra on 5by5’s Systematic to talk about Macs, art, coding, and general geekery. You can find the show notes and download the episode at: 5by5.tv/systematic/58. Thanks for listening!
